displayName: A1 — Audit log fallback engaged (writeAuditLog FAILED after retries)

documentation.content: Triggered when [writeAuditLog] FAILED after retries appears more than 3 times in 1h. Indicates audit-log primary writes are losing data and falling back to auditLogFailures collection. Compliance: RDC 978 Art. 128, ADR-0017. Runbook: docs/observability/RUNBOOK.md#a1-audit-log-fallback-engaged

conditionMatchedLog.filter: resource.type="cloud_function" AND resource.labels.region="southamerica-east1" AND severity="ERROR" AND textPayload:"[writeAuditLog] FAILED after retries"
